What's up guys today? I'm going to make a quick video on how to import your virtual cookbook funnel. So what you're going to do, make sure that you are logged into your click funnels and you have it up in a new tab. Just makes the process a little easier. So here we are at the fulfillment 2.0 module. We're going to go into our downloads. Virtual cookbook share funnel. Then click on there. You'll open up the click funnels. And as you can see here, it is downloading and importing into your funnel. So once it's imported, you'll just hit view funnel. And here you are, your funnel is now imported. And you'll just follow along with the rest of the training videos to fix your paths and everything else that needs to be updated in the virtual cookbook. Alright guys, hope you guys enjoy this. Have a great day and we will see you in the next video.
